title: Two way sync with Toggl or other Time Tracking App
excerpt: A two-way sync with Toggl time tracking would solve so many issues a lot of users have with time tracking capacbilites. I’m of the camp that we bring as much of our workflow into Monday and reporting and using Toggl for …

posts.author: JackHeadford (Jack Headford)
posts.cookedHtml:
A two-way sync with Toggl time tracking would solve so many issues a lot of users have with time tracking capacbilites. I’m of the camp that we bring as much of our workflow into Monday and reporting and using Toggl for time tracking outside of our dashboards for leadership is very frustrating.

I get improving time tracking may not be a huge focus, judging from the other threads on time tracking, but that would be a huge benefit.

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: The biggest answer from clients deciding between Clickup and Monday lately is that Clickup has better apps for time tracking integrated than Monday. Don’t know why is not on the Road map.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, Toggl added the ability to create webhooks via its API at some point. monday could create an integration to create those webhooks to get Toggl events (such as timers starting/stopping) to sync with monday. It wouldnt even need to start/stop a monday.com time tracking column, just update a column for the hours/minutes tracked.

posts.author: OliviaCrellin (Olivia Crellin)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% agree. Such a faff having to duplicate and exhausting for my team. This should be an easy fix - what’s taking Monday a year to add as a feature!?

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
@anon29275264 @OliviaCrellin @JackHeadford @ofuks001
There are now additional smart features on the time tracking clock using Smart Timer and Team Tracking app which has the same look and feel as the native monday.com timer.

We had the same pain point with our service based business, there was so much the native time couldn’t do that we needed, so we got our dev to build a solution which we have now released to the monday.com marketplace.

We also built in the ability for the team to see LIVE who is recording time on what, this helps us to manage our remote team and re-delegate work as needed.

We have only recently launched so if there are any tweaks that would help it better suit your business feel free to add to the live chat and we will see if we can roll it out in the next update
